text:
Panda Maid (メイドパンダ, Meido Panda) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game. 
__NOTOC__

Summary

Panda Maid メイドパンダ - This card allows the caster to summon forth a Panda Maid. This endangered species is very neat and loves to cook. Each one has a hobby such as sewing or gardening. They have a particular skill for taking good care of human children. The user should be able to leave their children in the loving care of these creatures!

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.099 :: メイドパンダ 
絶滅寸前の珍獣。大変きれい好きで、料理が趣味。個体によっては洋裁やガーデニングもたしなむ。何よりも人間の子供の面倒を見るのが得意。
|-
![Eng]
|No.099 :: Panda Maid 
A rare endangered animal. It's very tidy and loves cooking as a hobby. Some individuals love gardening and dressmaking too. It's good at taking card of human children more than anything.
|}

Trivia

Gon receives this card by Goreinu.
Aside from Ruler's Blessing, this is the last card Team Gon gets.
During an interview, Togashi mentioned that he would have liked to have Panda Maid while he was working on Green Island, especially since the Greed Island arc was based on his experience struggling with having a weekly serialization and a baby at the same time. Togashi’s Q&A on “Iwakura and Yoshizumi’s Show”
